rationale: The citation is used in the methods section to justify and anchor the incentive-aligned contingent valuation treatment: the authors explicitly note that the BDM procedure was introduced into marketing for point-of-purchase WTP measurement by Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002). They then implement that same BDM-style random pricing mechanism in their experiment. This is a concrete methodological role rather than a generic background mention, even though the cited paper is not the main theoretical focus of the article.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the BDM-based point-of-purchase WTP elicitation approach associated with Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002) as one of its experimental treatments. It uses that method in a new conjoint-comparison context rather than directly extending the cited paper's theory.
